_meta.author: isaiahbjork
_meta.title: Message Dock
_meta.description: This is an animated, expandable message dock component that allows users to select a character and send contextual messages through a sleek, reactive UI. It supports emoji-based avatars, online indicators, gradient themes, and smooth transitions using framer-motion, with auto-collapse, outside-click handling, and full customization options via props. Perfect for AI assistant selectors, chat applications, work dashboards, character chatbots, onboarding helpers, or interactive UI mascots in apps or games.
